title: WHAT OUR GUESTS SAY
subtitle: Real experiences from guests who cooked with Rabab

reviews.text: An absolutely magical experience! Rabab welcomed us into her home like family. We learned to make the most incredible tagine and fresh bread in a traditional clay oven. The flavors were unlike anything I've ever tasted. This was the highlight of our Morocco trip!

Rabab is an incredible teacher! Her passion for Amazigh cuisine is infectious. We made couscous from scratch, learned the secrets of her family's spice blends, and enjoyed the most delicious meal together. The pickup from Taghazout was seamless. Highly recommend!

This cooking class exceeded all expectations! Rabab's traditional kitchen is beautiful, and learning to cook authentic Moroccan dishes while hearing stories about Berber culture was unforgettable. The amlou we made was incredible - I've been craving it ever since!

A truly authentic experience! Rabab's hospitality is warm and genuine. We baked bread in her wood-fired oven, prepared a lamb tagine, and learned the traditional Moroccan tea ceremony. The views of the Atlas Mountains from her village were stunning. A must-do!

Wonderful cooking experience with Rabab! She was patient and knowledgeable, teaching us family recipes passed down through generations. The food was delicious and we left with recipe cards to recreate the dishes at home. A perfect cultural immersion!

Best experience in Morocco! Rabab's cooking class is so much more than just cooking - it's a journey into Amazigh culture and traditions. The tajine we made was perfection, and her homemade mint tea was divine. Don't miss this if you're in the area!
